meta.description: End-to-end formula pipeline test dataset — 18 scenarios covering all pipeline stages from translation extraction through frontend rendering

scenarios.name: 翻译路径：简单展示公式提取

input.translation_text:
The UAV speed at time slot t is:

$$v_t = \frac{\|U(t + 1) - U(t)\|_2}{\tau}$$

The flight distance within the i-th time slot is:

$$l_{i,i+1} = \|U(i + 1) - U(i)\|_2$$

The flight speed constraint:

$$l_{t,t+1} \le v_{\max} \cdot \tau, \quad 1 \le t \le T - 1$$

scenarios.name: 翻译路径：cases 环境 + 中文 \text{} 公式

input.translation_text:
The scheduling indicator is defined as:

$$a_k(t) = \begin{cases} 1, & \text{节点在时隙 t 决定进行任务卸载}, \\ 0, & \text{该节点等待在未来的时隙中进行传输}. \end{cases}$$

The coverage constraint is:

$$a_k(t) \cdot d_k^2(t) \le C^2$$

scenarios.name: 翻译路径：多行 aligned 环境自动提升

input.translation_text:
The optimization problem is:

$\begin{aligned} \mathbf{P1}: \min & \sum_{k=1}^{K} w_k \bar{A}_k \\ \text{s.t.} \quad & l_{t,t+1} \leq v_{\max} \cdot \tau \\ & a_k(t) \in \{0, 1\} \end{aligned}$

The constraint set includes power and scheduling limits.

scenarios.name: 翻译路径：\text{subject to} 不被英文黑名单误杀

input.translation_text:
The problem is:

$$\min_{x \in \mathcal{X}} f(x) \quad \text{subject to} \quad g(x) \leq 0$$

And the condition:

$$h(x) = 0 \quad \text{for all} \quad x \in \mathcal{X}$$

scenarios.name: 翻译路径：碎片 $...$ 合并 + 过滤

input.translation_text:
The parameter $\varpi$ t = $\frac{P}{N}$ $\sum_{n=1}^{N}$ $D_U$ defines the weighted sum.

Another formula: $\varphi_{t}^{n,m} = 1$ means communication is possible.

scenarios.name: 翻译路径：混合良莠内容仅提取好的

input.translation_text:
Channel model:

$$g = \frac{\beta_0}{d^2}$$

Bad fragments: $\varphi$ t n,m $=$ 1 means communication. $\varpi$ t $=$ 0 otherwise.

SINR:

$$\gamma = \frac{P g}{\sigma^2 + I}$$

More garbage: $\leq$ R max is not a formula.

scenarios.name: 翻译路径：含 \boldsymbol 的公式不损坏

input.translation_text:
The control vector is:

$$\boldsymbol{v}_m(t) = (v_m^s(t), \varphi_m(t))$$

The bold notation uses \boldsymbol for Greek letters.

scenarios.name: 验证器：核心运算符公式通过
验证器：空/垃圾/碎片拒绝

formulas: \varpi t = P N n = 1 D U

scenarios.name: 验证器：下标/上标公式通过
验证器：cases 环境公式通过

formulas: a_k(t) = \begin{cases} 1, & \text{若节点在时隙 t 决定进行任务卸载}, \\ 0, & \text{否则}. \end{cases}

scenarios.name: 片段过滤：短字母卡片被移除

\frac{a}{b}

scenarios.name: 全管道集成：代表性论文翻译→提取

papers.name: Age-of-Task-Aware AAV
papers.translation_chunk:
## System Model

The UAV speed at time slot $t$ is defined as:

$$v_t = \frac{\|U(t + 1) - U(t)\|_2}{\tau}$$

The flight distance within the $i$-th time slot is:

$$l_{i,i+1} = \|U(i + 1) - U(i)\|_2$$

The flight speed constraint is given by:

$$l_{t,t+1} \le v_{\max} \cdot \tau, \quad 1 \le t \le T - 1$$

## Communication Model

The information transmission rate is:

$$R_k(t) = a_k(t) \cdot B \cdot \log_2 \left( 1 + \frac{p_k^{tr}(t) \cdot h_k(t)}{\sigma^2} \right)$$

where $h_k(t) = h_0 \cdot (d_k^2(t) + H^2)^{-1}$.

The scheduling indicator is:

$$a_k(t) = \begin{cases} 1, & \text{the node decides to offload at slot } t, \\ 0, & \text{the node waits for future transmission}. \end{cases}$$

The average transmit power constraint:

$$\lim_{T \to \infty} \frac{1}{T} \sum_{t=1}^{T} (a_k(t) \cdot p_k^{tr}(t)) \le \bar{p}$$

papers.name: Aerial-Marine Integrated Networks
papers.translation_chunk:
## Communication Model

The server selection decision is:

$$s_i^m = \begin{cases} 1, & \text{UAV } i \text{ selects server } m \text{ at slot } t \text{ to process tasks} \\ 0, & \text{otherwise} \end{cases}$$

The large-scale path loss (UAV-MASS):

$$L_i^M|_{\text{dB}} = L_0 + 10\lambda \log_{10} \left( \frac{d_i^m}{d_0} \right) + X_\sigma + \varrho F$$

The small-scale Rician fading:

$$\tilde{u}_i^m = \sqrt{\frac{K_R}{1+K_R}} + \sqrt{\frac{1}{1+K_R}} g_i^m, \quad g_i^m \sim \mathcal{CN}(0, 1)$$

The channel coefficient is $h_i^m = (L_i^M)^{-1/2} \tilde{u}_i^m$ and the channel gain is $H_i^m = G_U G_M |h_i^m|^2$.

The Shannon capacity:

$$R_i^m = s_i^m W_i^m \log_2 \left( 1 + \frac{p_i H_i^m}{\sigma^2} \right)$$

## Computation Model

The local computation delay is $t_i^{\text{loc}} = \frac{a_i D \alpha}{\rho_i}$.

scenarios.name: Σ 求和运算符映射修复
完整优化问题公式（最复杂场景）

input.translation_text:
The complete optimization problem is formulated as:

$$\begin{aligned} \mathbf{P1}: \min_{\mathbf{Z}=\{\mathbf{s}, \mathbf{p}, \mathbf{\beta}, \mathbf{\rho}\}} \quad & \mathcal{G} = \sum_{i \in \mathcal{I}} G_i \\ \text{s.t.} \quad & 0 \leq a_i \leq a^{\max}, \quad \forall i \in \mathcal{I}, \\ & s_i^m \in \{0, 1\}, \quad \forall i \in \mathcal{I}, \; \forall m \in \mathcal{M}, \\ & \sum_{m=0}^{M} s_i^m \leq 1, \quad \forall i \in \mathcal{I}, \\ & 0 \leq p_i \leq p_i^{\max}, \quad \forall i \in \mathcal{I}, \\ & 0 \leq \rho_i \leq \rho_i^{\max}, \quad \forall i \in \mathcal{I}, \\ & 0 \leq \beta_i^m \leq 1, \quad \forall i \in \mathcal{I}, \quad \forall m \in \mathcal{M}, \\ & \sum_{i \in \Lambda_m} \beta_i^m \leq 1, \quad \forall m \in \mathcal{M}, \\ & t_i^{loc} \leq T_i^{th}, \quad \forall i \in \mathcal{I}, \\ & t_i^{edge} \leq T_i^{th}, \quad \forall i \in \mathcal{I}. \end{aligned}$$

where $G_i = \mu_i^t T_i + \mu_i^e E_i$ with $\mu_i^t + \mu_i^e = 1$.
